content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — description.txt claims "AI-powered suggestions," "Built-in ad blocker," and "Works fully offline," but ContentView.swift (App/ContentView.swift:1-19) implements only a plain in-memory task list with no ML/AI frameworks, no ad-blocking/content-blocker extension, and no offline-storage/networking code found anywhere in the project.

Pierre: Apple explicitly checks that marketing claims match actual functionality under 2.1/2.3, and reviewers routinely reject apps that mention AI or ad-blocking with no corresponding implementation. Here the entire app is a simple `@State` task list with no CoreML/CreateML import, no content-blocker extension target, and no persistence layer to justify "fully offline." Please remove these unsupported claims from the description or implement the actual features before submission.
